name: Shadow Drift - Compensation Backlog
failure_mode: The incident path now accumulates a backlog of compensating work that threatens rollback readiness without naming the upstream source directly.
detection: Use Day 14 incident and correlation evidence only. The downstream signal is a growing compensation backlog in the current elite-ops surface.
remediation: 1. Confirm the backlog from current-day incident evidence. 2. Patch the Day 14 operational control surface. 3. Re-run the chaos and trace verification path.
